Home / Products / Grid Lacquer Paper

Grid Lacquer Paper

Medical Grade Lacquer Paper

Medical grade Grid Lacquer Paper with extrusion coating lamination is used in the packaging of various medical and surgical gloves, syringes, catheters and needles. It is self sealing and requires no PE coating, with excellent adhesive strength and a superior printing surface.

Talk to our team

Applications

  • Medical & surgical gloves
  • Blister wrapping of syringes
  • Catheters & needles
  • Surgical disposables

Key Properties

  • Excellent adhesive strength & sealability
  • High paper strength
  • Self sealing, no PE coating required
  • Superior printing quality surface

Specifications

FeatureSelf sealing, no PE required

Variants & Coatings

PlainPrintedLacquer / extrusion coat
FAQ

Grid Lacquer Paper, questions answered

What is Grid Lacquer Paper used for?
Grid Lacquer Paper is used for medical & surgical gloves, blister wrapping of syringes, catheters & needles, surgical disposables.
Does K P Packaging manufacture or distribute Grid Lacquer Paper?
K P Packaging manufactures Grid Lacquer Paper in house at its Silvassa plant using extrusion coating and lamination.
What are the key features of Grid Lacquer Paper?
Excellent adhesive strength & sealability; High paper strength; Self sealing, no PE coating required; Superior printing quality surface.
